app.title: Fitbit Health Dashboard
language.label: Language
sidebar.upload_help: Upload your Fitbit Takeout.zip. The file will be processed automatically.
sidebar.privacy_body: Your data is processed in memory only. No file is kept on the server.
sidebar.instructions_body:
1. Export your data from the Fitbit app
2. Upload the ZIP file here (temporary processing)
3. Charts will generate automatically
4. Click "Generate and download report" below
error.extract_failed: Unable to extract data from the file. Please check the format.
info.no_data: No data available. Please upload your Takeout.zip from the sidebar. Data is processed temporarily and is not stored.
success.pdf_generated: PDF report generated successfully! Downloading automatically...
warning.pdf_unavailable: PDF generation unavailable, offering HTML download instead.
metric.name: Name
note.hr_continuous: Continuous chart showing all heart rate readings. Each point is a real-time measurement. Use your mouse to zoom into specific periods.
info.no_hr_detailed: Detailed heart rate data not available.
note.activity_continuous: Continuous chart showing physical activity minute by minute. Helps identify periods of activity and rest.
note.sleep_analysis: Sleep duration and quality. 7 to 9 hours is recommended for adults. Sleep efficiency (time asleep / time in bed) should ideally be above 85%.
note.hrv: HRV (RMSSD) indicates the recovery capacity of the autonomic nervous system. Higher HRV is generally associated with better recovery and lower stress.
note.spo2: Oxygen saturation (SpO2) indicates how much oxygen your blood carries. A normal value is between 95% and 100%.
note.stress: The stress score combines multiple metrics to estimate the body's stress level. A low score over a prolonged period may indicate a need for recovery.
info.stress_invalid: Stress data present but not valid.
footer.title: Fitbit Health Dashboard
footer.disclaimer: This report is provided for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified health professional for medical decisions.
report.title: Fitbit Health Report
report.subtitle: Continuous detailed report
report.instructions_body:
1. Click the red button "Print / save PDF"
2. In the dialog, select "Save as PDF"
3. Choose A4 format and default margins
4. Click "Save"
analysis.hrv_low: Low HRV: {value:.1f} ms (may indicate stress or overtraining)
